name: givewell-skills
description: GiveWell research tooling for Claude Code. Currently hosts the spreadsheet vetting skill.

plugins.name: givewell-vetting
plugins.description: Run a full GiveWell-style spreadsheet vet on a workbook. Checks formulas, sources, readability, hardcoded values, and severity-classified findings. Outputs a Vetting Summary Google Doc and a Findings Google Sheet.
